Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}...S-So, today at school, we got our homework assignments, and...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}Ah, sorry. I'm... just a little nervous.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I shared a special evening with Fuuka.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel an unbreakable bond between us...[n]{f 1 1}
